description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure, possibly a king or wise man, wearing a crown and holding an object in one hand. The figure is draped in a flowing red cloak with a blue and white garment visible underneath, and the posture suggests a sense of dignity or authority. The facial features are detailed, with a beard and a solemn expression. The crown is gold-toned and sits atop the figure's head, adding to the regal appearance. The base is rounded and dark, providing stability to the upright figure. The paintwork is somewhat weathered, giving the sculpture an aged, classical look.
description: A crowned, robed human figure sculpture with a red cloak, blue and white garments, and a gold-toned crown, standing on a rounded base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the figure's profile, crown, and the draped red cloak with the hand and object partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full sweep of the red cloak and the back of the crown, with little detail of the face or front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the extended arm and object more clearly, with the blue base and cloak folds visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the face, crown, both arms, and the layered garments, with the object in hand most prominent.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure wearing a crown and robe
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
